description: Style NoteElement by hugo boss is a lasting fragrance for men. It's great when worn during the day and night. The perfect go-to perfume for a day-to-night ensemble.Product DetailsThe Element fragrance for men from hugo boss has hints of citrus, wood and spices, and is perfect for a romantic occasion. The element opens with fresh, aquatic top notes that meld with a heart of ginger and coriander. A cedar wood base brings the essence full circle.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize60 ml
